songs.voce: A romantic, heartfelt song about presence, memory and desire.
songs.doce-amor: An intimate romantic samba, full of passion and remembrance.
songs.armadilhas-do-amor: A song about the conflicts, illusions and emotional games of a relationship.
songs.mais-voce: A song about choice, emotional dependence and the fear of losing the one you love.
songs.amor-e-razao: A track about the clash between feeling and reason.
songs.fala-na-cara: A samba with attitude about honesty, courage and putting an end to mind games.
songs.brigas: A song about wear, pride and conflict within a relationship.
songs.saudade: A song about accepting the end, missing someone and choosing not to reach out again.

album.label: New project
album.imgAlt: Artwork for the Jeito de Sambar project
album.p1: An original project by Rico Samba bringing together samba, bossa, modern pagode, choro and MPB in songs about love, longing, meetings, farewells and new beginnings.
album.p2: Each track reveals a piece of this universe: the ache of missing someone, the courage to say goodbye, the wish to stay and the honesty of singing what you live.

lyrics.label: Lyrics that become stories
lyrics.title: Feelings so many people live
lyrics.subtitle: Rico Samba's songs speak of longing, arguments, love, pride, farewells and the will to start over.

about.label: About
about.title: A samba all your own
about.imgAlt: Rico Samba in a musical setting
about.p1: Rico Samba is an original Brazilian music project that blends samba, bossa, choro, modern pagode and MPB in songs about love, longing, meetings and farewells.
about.p2: With direct, heartfelt lyrics, Rico Samba turns relationship stories into music to sing, remember and share.
about.p3: The project was born from the desire to create a modern, romantic, Brazilian samba — with guitar, percussion, memorable melodies and one simple truth: everyone has a samba all their own.

epk.heroSubtitle: Official materials for bookers, producers and press: biography, releases, photos, show formats, technical rider and professional contact.
epk.shortBio: Rico Samba is an original samba project blending samba, bossa, choro, modern pagode and Brazilian MPB. With lyrics about love, longing, meetings and farewells, the artist presents a heartfelt, popular repertoire with a Brazilian identity and a contemporary voice.
longBio: Rico Samba is an original Brazilian music project born from the desire to create a modern, romantic and heartfelt samba that speaks to today's audience without losing its roots. The sound blends samba, bossa, choro, modern pagode and MPB, always with the swing of the samba circle as its starting point.

The lyrics speak of relationships: love, longing, desire, arguments, reconciliation, pride and new beginnings. They are direct, heartfelt stories, made to sing, remember and share — from the intimacy of a solo guitar to the energy of a samba circle.

The original repertoire includes songs such as “Você”, “Doce Amor”, “Armadilhas do Amor”, “Mais Você”, “Amor e Razão”, “Fala na Cara”, “Brigas” and “Saudade”, all part of the Jeito de Sambar project — a body of work that gathers meetings and farewells into a modern, intimate and Brazilian samba.
More than songs, Rico Samba offers an experience: recognizing, in each song, a piece of your own story. Everyone has a samba all their own.

voz-violao.title: Voice & Guitar
voz-violao.description: An intimate format with voice and guitar, focused on original songs and classics of samba, bossa and MPB.
voz-violao.ideal: Bars, restaurants, private events, receptions and smaller venues.

samba-bossa-pagode.title: Samba / Bossa / Modern Pagode
samba-bossa-pagode.description: A performance with accompaniment or a small band, uniting original songs and the swing of modern samba.
samba-bossa-pagode.ideal: Music venues, cultural events and parties with dancing.

roda.title: Rico Samba Circle
roda.description: An upbeat samba-circle format, with original songs plus samba, pagode and MPB classics for the audience to sing along.
roda.ideal: Samba circles, open-air events and get-togethers.

pocket.title: Pocket Show
pocket.description: A short, versatile performance, adaptable to the event's time and space.
pocket.ideal: Corporate events, launches, get-togethers and cultural events.

items: Armless stool or chair, if needed

items: Mixing console and PA suited to the audience

artista.title: Artist release
artista.text: Rico Samba is an original samba project blending samba, bossa, choro, modern pagode and Brazilian MPB. With lyrics about love, longing, meetings and farewells, it presents a heartfelt, popular repertoire with a Brazilian identity and a contemporary voice. The project turns relationship stories into songs made to sing, remember and share.

album.title: Album release “Jeito de Sambar”
album.text: With the Jeito de Sambar project, Rico Samba presents an original repertoire uniting romance, Brazilian spirit and a contemporary sound. The songs speak of relationships, farewells, arguments, longing and desire, always with the swing of samba as the starting point. An intimate, Brazilian body of work, made for those who live music as memory, circle and feeling.

single.title: Current single release
single.text: Rico Samba presents the new single, another chapter of the Jeito de Sambar project. The track brings together the artist's sensitive, romantic lyrics and the swing of modern samba, in a song about love, longing and new beginnings. Available on the main music platforms.

curto.title: Short release (Instagram / cultural listing)
curto.text: Rico Samba — original samba blending bossa, choro, modern pagode and MPB, with lyrics about love, longing and new beginnings. The Jeito de Sambar project.
